demographics.living_situation: lives at home with partner, who is present

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My belly is suddenly huge and tight, my ankles are completely swollen, and I can't catch a deep breath anymore.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The belly and leg swelling has ballooned over the last couple of weeks and now I can't take a proper breath unless I'm sitting up.

symptom_narrative.onset: the belly and leg swelling came on over the past couple of weeks and has got much worse fast
symptom_narrative.character: my belly is huge, tight and bloated, my ankles and legs are really puffy, and I get puffed out and can't take a deep breath
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it's been — I can't lie flat, I'm stuck propped up in the recliner
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my belly, both legs and ankles, and my breathing
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there all the time, and much worse when I lie down
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting upright in the recliner with my legs up eases my breathing a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat makes the breathlessness much worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a dull ache in the upper right side of my tummy that started a while back; I've also been really tired for a long time and a bit foggy in the head
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm basically bedbound and stuck in the chair, propped up on three pillows just to breathe, and I can barely move around

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing tiredness and 'brain fog' that I'd put down to getting older
past_medical_history.how_managed: never looked into it or saw anyone about it

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: no medical conditions I've ever been told I have — I've hardly seen a doctor over the years

social_history_volunteered.alcohol: not something I've talked to a doctor about
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I used IV drugs briefly in my early twenties, roughly 30 years ago, and haven't since. I've never been screened or tested for hepatitis C. I live with my partner, who is here with me and made this call.

access_barriers.transport: bedbound and unable to mobilise safely; relies on partner

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/partner description over video, not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: both ankles and lower legs look badly swollen and puffy up to the shins
partner reports she is breathing fast and shallow and has to stay propped upright on pillows in the recliner to breathe
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: caregiver observation, no measured respiratory rate or oxygen level available

objective_data_offered.value: she looks thin and drawn in the face and upper body despite the swollen belly
